questions.question: State your full name and your role at the company.
Walk me through your evening from the investor reception until you went home.
Where were you between 9:00 PM and 10:30 PM?
What time did you leave the investor reception?
Where did you go after leaving the investor reception?
Who can confirm you were home after 8:30 PM?
When did you last see Elena Park alive?
How would you describe your working relationship with Elena?
Were you and Elena arguing about the audit or missing records?
Why would Elena confront you about the missing trial data?
Why did Elena call you at 9:12 PM?
If you went home at 8:30 PM, how do you explain the 9:12 PM call from Elena?
Why does your badge appear in the access logs at 9:18 PM?
How can your badge be used at 9:18 PM if you were already home?
Did you return to the office after the reception?
Did you enter Elena's office after the reception?
Did the 9:12 PM call lead you to go back to Elena's office?
What do you know about the missing USB drive?
Did you remove the USB drive from the conference room?
Why would someone take the USB drive on the same night Elena died?
How do you explain the east-stairwell image from around 9:52 PM?
If you were home, why is someone with your build seen near the east stairwell?
Did the argument with Elena become physical?
Did you touch Elena during the argument?
Did Elena try to stop you from leaving with the USB drive?
How did Elena suffer the head injury?
Did you kill Elena Park?
Repeat your alibi again, from 8:30 PM to 10:30 PM.
Earlier you said you never returned to the office. Are you changing that answer now?
Tell me again what the 9:12 PM call was about.
Tell me again why your badge was used at 9:18 PM.
Tell me again what happened to the USB drive.
Give me your exact timeline one more time.
The 9:12 PM call and the 9:18 PM badge entry point to the same thing. What really happened?
The badge entry and the missing USB drive both point back to you. What are you leaving out?
The call, badge log, USB drive, and east-stairwell image all place you back in the building. Explain that.
What is the part of your story you have been trying not to say?
Give me the full truth about what happened in Elena's office.
What responsibilities did you have as operations manager?
What was supposed to happen in the records review the next morning?
